code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i <= n
    let m3 = i % 3 == 0
    let m5 = i % 5 == 0
    if m3 and m5
      println("FizzBuzz")
    else if m3
      println("Fizz")
    else if m5
      println("Buzz")
    else
      println("#{i}")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
